series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of applications for licensure that have been withdrawn at the request of the applicant, applications closed due to applicant abandonment, and administratively closed applications.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once machine readable version verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain for one year after request to withdraw is granted, or when the application is considered closed, through abandonment or administratively, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
